examples: This money is my only income
The stone wall was the backdrop for the performance
The children made up the chorus
This sum represents my entire income for a year
These few men comprise his entire army

meanings.definition: create and charge with a task or function

examples: This wall forms the background of the stage setting

meanings.definition: set up or lay the groundwork for
brought about or set up or accepted; especially long established
examples: a team established as a member of a major league
enjoyed his prestige as an established writer
